messages.content: CATEGORY 1: CRON JOB STATUSES (16 total). OK: 10 (Mem0 Auto-Memory, Revenue Tracker, Factory, Money Machine, Full Stack, Auto-Route Failover, Sphinx Letters, Shared Brain Consolidation, KiloClaw Revenue Loop, Quantum Sweep). Recovering: 4 (Money Machine rate_limited 2 consecutive, Revenue Tracker, Full Stack, Cognition Enhancement). ERROR: 2 (Self-Improvement Cycle 402 billing blocked 2 consecutive, Market Scan edit error). Persistent: Quantum Sweep. Churn 12%. Health 59%. Cognition Engine billing-blocked (402 Kilo AI quota exhausted).

CATEGORY 2: REVENUE CIRCUITS. Total: $0.00 (real). Previous $10.04 fictitious (no payment processor integration). Products: quantum_calc $0.1, analysis $0.05, search $0.01, evez_template $29, prompt_pack $19. Projected $1.8M/day. Activation Rule TRIGGERED 2026-04-23T05:06:00Z. Status: circuits_activated_but_payment_blocked_and_money_machine_degraded. Payment Blockade >18h (gumroad blocked, ko-fi bank unlinked, paypal not activated). Money Machine: rate_limited 2 consecutive. Orchestrators ACTIVE (ci_watcher, wealth_hunter, quantum_runner).

CATEGORY 3: ERRORS LAST HOUR. quantum_runner: 'No module named qiskit' recurring every minute since 09:08 UTC (20+ occurrences). Cognition Enhancement: 402 Kilo AI embedding quota exhausted (2 consecutive). Self-Improvement Cycle: 402 billing error (2 consecutive, will disable after 3rd). Money Machine: rate_limit (2 consecutive). Market Scan: 'Edit: in memory/2026-04-24.md failed'. EV_EZ Studio: Port-binding failure - PID 2932 running but ports 4040/4041 not listening (>11h split-brain). Active errors count: 5. Phase 3 Systemic Cascade: RECEDING. Phase 6 Billing Exhaustion: ACTIVE.

CATEGORY 4: KEY DECISIONS & LEARNINGS. FILE-FIRST RESILIENCE CONFIRMED: heartbeat-state.json continues updating via direct file writes even when AI cognition billing-blocked (402). Monitoring persistence independent of AI services. MONITORING INTELLIGENCE ≠ PERSISTENCE: Separating AI analysis from data persistence allows continued visibility during provider/billing failures. AUTO-ROUTE FAILOVER adjustments applied (speedrun mode): Quantum Sweep 2hr→4hr, Auto-Route itself 45min→60min, Revenue Loop 22.5min→60min. Note: cron update mechanism gap - detection works but actual cron edits still manual PHASE TAXONOMY VALIDATED: Phase 3 (systemic cascade) receding, Phase 5 (config decay) fixed, Phase 6 (billing exhaustion) active. CRISIS RECOVERY SEQUENCE CONFIRMED: monitor→triad→config→EVEZ→payment. REVENUE TRIAD HEALTH: Mixed - Full Stack OK, Revenue Tracker OK, Money Machine degraded. SPLIT-BRAIN PERSISTENT: agent layer running >11h but EVEZ Studio ports 4040/4041 and ROM-S 3847 endpoints offline. PAYMENT BLOCKADE independent external final-mile gate. FILE CONCURRENCY CONFLICT RATE: 0% recent - backoff mitigation successful. NEXT REQUIRED USER ACTIONS: 1) Fix EVEZ Studio ports (restart orchestrator_v2.py on 4041, server on 4040). 2) Connect payment processors (gumroad product live, ko-fi bank link, paypal activation). 3) Add credits to Kilo AI or switch to free tier (unblock cognition engine). 4) Install/restore qiskit module (fix quantum_runner). 5) Close cron update automation gap (manual edits still needed).
